item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 41min As @sam_golf said good summary here. Raises the (slim?) prospect of LIV continuing wit
item.description:
Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 41min As @sam_golf said good summary here. Raises the (slim?) prospect of LIV continuing with significantly less money to spend. Then we’ll find out how committed to the project some of the big names are, or whether – shock – it was only ever about the bottom line. Cita trey wingo @wingoz · 7h Additional reporting after multiple conversations today with sources close to the situation:
- This is not being characterized internally as a funding cutoff, but rather a transition. LIV Golf is funded through the end of the year and they were given two choices:
You can shut x.com/wingoz/status/… 3 8 3 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 46min If Rory can win the Masters again why can't Ronnie win an eighth world title? Well, many
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 46min If Rory can win the Masters again why can't Ronnie win an eighth world title? Well, many reasons I suppose, including that the two are not linked, but I enjoyed reading @Richard_Mann11 's case for the GOAT. Read here with login, midday tomorrow without: De sportinglife.com 1 1 1 mil

item.description:

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 5h This cannot be real. Cita David Rumsey @_DavidRumsey · 11h Here is the full email LIV Golf
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 5h This cannot be real. Cita David Rumsey @_DavidRumsey · 11h Here is the full email LIV Golf CEO Scott O'Neil sent to league staffers this afternoon, obtained by @FOS. 26 2 84 45 mil
